options.text: applies to all ships, oil platforms, barges and private yachts
tankers greater than 150GT and cargo ships greater than 400GT
applies to all ships, oil platforms, barges and private yachts and hydrofoils
applies to all ships, oil platforms, barges and private yachts and hovercrafts

explanation: MARPOL is a comprehensive convention that applies to all ships, including commercial vessels, private yachts, barges, and offshore platforms, to prevent pollution from operational and accidental causes.
